/proc/meminfo中的DirectMap所统计的不是关于内存的使用，而是: DirectMap in /proc/meminfo does not describe memory usage; it is an indicator of TLB efficiency. The TLB (Translation Lookaside Buffer) is a cache on the CPU used to translate virtual memory addresses into physical addresses. Because the TLB has a limited size, addresses that cannot be cached require a lookup in the page table in memory, which is much slower. To fit as many addresses as possible into the TLB, newer CPU hardware supports pages larger than 4k so that the number of addresses is reduced, for example 2MB, 4MB or even 1GB memory pages depending on the hardware. "DirectMap4k" is the amount of memory mapped with 4kB pages, "DirectMap2M" is the amount of memory mapped with 2MB pages, and so on. So DirectMap is in fact an indicator of TLB efficiency
`dmesg -T` 有时看到 conntrack table full 的报错: `dmesg -T` sometimes reports conntrack table full, which most likely means the conntrack limit is too small and the kernel parameter needs to be adjusted
swap使用过高，会影响系统io性能，如果内存够用但swap使用很高，可以调小s: High swap usage hurts system IO performance. If memory is sufficient but swap usage is high, consider lowering the swappiness value
以现在的硬件配置，通常句柄的 ulimit 应该比较大，如果低于 4096，大概: With today's hardware the file handle ulimit should normally be fairly large. A value below 4096 most likely means the configuration was forgotten, so pay attention. This data is collected by the procstat plugin of Categraf.
大于0，说明有进程内存不够用了，需要考虑扩容或升级配置了: A value greater than 0 means some process ran out of memory; consider scaling out or upgrading the configuration
大于200G的盘，空间不足了: Disk larger than 200G is running out of space
如果cpu使用率超过50%，可以通过top命令查看机器上是否有异常进程，如果没有: If CPU usage exceeds 50%, use the top command to check whether there are abnormal processes on the machine. If there are none, the service needs to scale out or the machine needs a configuration upgrade
如果内存使用率超过50%，则需要扩容或者升级配置了: If memory usage exceeds 50%, scale out or upgrade the configuration
如果没有启用 swap，这个图表是 No Data，是符合预期的: If swap is not enabled, this chart shows No Data, which is expected
如果超过80%，建议把文件描述符的最大个数调大，或者扩容: If it exceeds 80%, increase the maximum number of file descriptors or scale out
小于200G的盘，空间不足了: Disk smaller than 200G is running out of space
机器台账表格视图（使用 Categraf 作为采集器）: Machine Inventory Table View (Categraf as collector)
机器常用指标（如果只想看当前业务组内的机器修改大盘变量 ident 的变量类型为: Common Machine Metrics (to only see machines of the current business group, change the dashboard variable ident to the host-ident type)
机器监控 - agent失联超过60秒: Machine monitoring - agent lost for more than 60 seconds
机器监控 - 时间偏移超过3秒，请注意: Machine monitoring - time offset exceeds 3 seconds, attention
每个CPU Core的平均负载任务超过3: Average load per CPU core exceeds 3
熵池太小 ，程序使用随机函数会阻塞，可以安装 rng-tools 工具增加熵池大: If the entropy pool is too small, programs using random functions will block. You can install the rng-tools package to increase the entropy pool size, see https://codeantenna.com/a/Ab6aMd3NSA
硬盘出错，0是正常，非0是异常: Disk errors, 0 is normal, non-zero is abnormal
硬盘监控 - 大于200G的盘，空间不足了: Disk monitoring - disk larger than 200G is running out of space
硬盘监控 - 小于200G的盘，空间不足了: Disk monitoring - disk smaller than 200G is running out of space
硬盘监控 - 预测硬盘会在未来4小时内写满: Disk monitoring - disk predicted to be full within 4 hours
进程句柄数限制（低于4096要注意）: Process File Handle Limit (below 4096 needs attention)
进程数超过2000，可以考虑扩容了: Process count exceeds 2000, consider scaling out
进程监控-有进程数为0，某进程可能挂了: Process monitoring - a process count is 0, the process may be down
进程监控-进程句柄限制过小: Process monitoring - process file handle limit too small
